Name: Average time from Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR to Request Payment
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR' and activity 'Request Payment'

Name: Total time between Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION and Request Payment in variants that include Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Request Payment'

Name: Minimum time it takes Request Payment to be done after Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR in cases that previously experienced a Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR' and activity 'Request Payment'

Name: Average time for Request Payment grouped by case:BudgetNumber
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Request Payment' and the end of case grouped by the last value of case:BudgetNumber

Name: Total resolution time of Request Payment in variants without any rejection steps
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Request Payment' and the end of case where activity 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER does not occur

Name: Time from Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE to Request Payment in cases that were rejected by PRE_APPROVER at least once
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Request Payment'

Name: Elapsed time between Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR and Request Payment compared to the elapsed time between Request Payment and Payment Handled
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR' and activity 'Payment Handled'

Name: Average waiting time to the Request Payment after the last approval activity (Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR, Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER, or Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION)
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR' and activity 'Request Payment'

Name: Minimum time between Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER and the subsequent Request Payment in re-submitted cases
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER' and activity 'Request Payment'

Name: Time of Request Payment in domestic declaration cases versus pre-paid travel cost cases, as described in the event log description
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity Request Payment and the end of the case

Name: Total time it takes Request Payment to be done after the final approval step in variants that include a prior rejection by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR' and activity 'Request Payment'

Name: Average time from the most recent Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE to Request Payment in cases with at least one Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Request Payment'

Name: Time between Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER and Request Payment in successful variants that did not encounter any rejection
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER' and activity 'Request Payment'

Name: Total time for Request Payment in cases that followed the shortest variant path (Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE → Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR → Request Payment → Payment Handled)
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Payment Handled'

Name: Minimum time from Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER to the next Request Payment across all rework loops involving PRE_APPROVER rejection
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER' and activity 'Request Payment'
